recommendations.title: Back in Action
recommendations.overview: Fifteen years after vanishing from the CIA to start a family, elite spies Matt and Emily jump back into the world of espionage when their cover is blown.

recommendations.title: Baywatch
recommendations.overview: Devoted lifeguard Mitch Buchannon butts heads with a brash new recruit. Together, they uncover a local criminal plot that threatens the future of the Bay.

recommendations.title: Identity Thief
recommendations.overview: When a mild-mannered businessman learns his identity has been stolen, he hits the road in an attempt to foil the thief -- a trip that puts him in the path of a deceptively harmless-looking woman.

recommendations.title: Freakonomics
recommendations.overview: Some of the world's most innovative documentary filmmakers will explore the hidden side of everything.
recommendations.director: Eugene Jarecki, Heidi Ewing, Alex Gibney, Morgan Spurlock, Seth Gordon, Rachel Grady

recommendations.title: The King of Kong: A Fistful of Quarters
recommendations.overview: In this hilarious arcade showdown, a humble novice goes head-to-head against the reigning Donkey Kong champ in a confrontation that rocks the gaming world to its processors! For over 20 years, Billy Mitchell has owned the throne of the Donkey Kong wo

recommendations.title: Four Christmases
recommendations.overview: Brad and Kate have made something of an art form out of avoiding their families during the holidays, but this year their foolproof plan is about go bust -- big time. Stuck at the city airport after all departing flights are canceled, the couple is em

recommendations.title: Set It Up
recommendations.overview: Two overworked and underpaid assistants come up with a plan to get their bosses off their backs by setting them up with each other.

recommendations.title: The Equalizer 3
recommendations.overview: Robert McCall finds himself at home in Southern Italy but he discovers his friends are under the control of local crime bosses. As events turn deadly, McCall knows what he has to do: become his friends' protector by taking on the mafia.

recommendations.title: Dear Zachary: A Letter to a Son About His Father
recommendations.overview: In 2001, Andrew Bagby, a medical resident, is murdered not long after breaking up with his girlfriend. Soon after, when she announces she's pregnant, one of Andrew's many close friends, Kurt Kuenne, begins this film, a gift to the child.

recommendations.title: The Second Tragic Fantozzi
recommendations.overview: The frustrating adventures of a humble employee who all the time has to fullfill the wishes and desires of his bosses.
